meta.title: Adkin Joinery | Joiner in Thornhill, Dumfries & Galloway
meta.description: Adkin Joinery — hand-made kitchens, house building, and general carpentry in Thornhill and across Dumfries & Galloway. Quality joinery, built to last.
meta.og_title: Adkin Joinery | Joiner in Thornhill, Dumfries & Galloway

home.hero_headline: Built by hand. Built to last.
home.hero_subheading: Joinery and carpentry across Dumfries & Galloway
home.intro_paragraph: Adkin Joinery designs and builds kitchens, houses, and bespoke carpentry for homeowners across Dumfries & Galloway. Every project is built by hand with care and precision — from full house builds to fitted kitchens and everyday carpentry.
home.services_intro: Whether you need a new kitchen, a full house build, or skilled carpentry for a renovation, we handle the whole job from design to completion.
home.cta_section_body: Tell us what you have in mind. We'll come to you, talk it through, and give you an honest quote — no pressure, no obligation.

about.headline: About Adkin Joinery
about.story_paragraph:
Adkin Joinery is run by Oliver Adkin, a skilled joiner based in Closeburn, Thornhill. Oliver works across Dumfries & Galloway, bringing the same care and attention to every project — whether it's a full house build or a set of shelves.

Every piece of work is built by hand. No shortcuts, no subcontractors, no templated solutions. Just honest joinery done properly.

services.headline: What we do
services.intro: From full-scale house builds to hand-made kitchens and everyday carpentry — we handle projects of every size.

service_items.name: House Building
service_items.description: Full house builds from foundations to finishing. We manage the joinery and carpentry elements of new-build projects, working alongside other trades to deliver a home built with precision and quality materials.

service_items.name: Hand-Made Kitchens
service_items.description: Bespoke kitchens designed and built to fit your space perfectly. Every cabinet, drawer, and worktop is made by hand — not pulled from a catalogue. Your kitchen, your way.

service_items.name: General Carpentry
service_items.description: Doors, windows, staircases, fitted furniture, shelving, renovations, and repairs. If it involves wood and skill, we do it — and we do it properly.

contact.headline: Get in touch
contact.intro: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within 24 hours. We cover Thornhill, Dumfries, Sanquhar, Moffat, Lockerbie, and all surrounding areas.

items.question: What areas do you cover?
items.answer: We cover Thornhill, Dumfries, Sanquhar, Moffat, Lockerbie, and all surrounding areas across Dumfries & Galloway.

items.question: Do you offer free quotes?
items.answer: Yes. We'll visit your property, discuss what you need, and provide an honest, no-obligation quote.

items.question: How long does a kitchen take?
items.answer: A typical hand-made kitchen takes 4 to 8 weeks from initial design to installation, depending on the size and complexity of the project.

items.question: Do you work with other trades?
items.answer: Yes. For house builds and larger renovations, we coordinate with plumbers, electricians, and other trades to keep your project on track.

how_we_work.title: Discuss
how_we_work.description: We visit your property, listen to your ideas, and talk through what's possible. No pressure, just an honest conversation about your project.

how_we_work.title: Design
how_we_work.description: We draw up a detailed plan and provide a clear, fixed quote. You know exactly what you're getting and what it costs before any work begins.

how_we_work.title: Build
how_we_work.description: We get to work. Every piece is built by hand with quality materials. We keep you updated throughout and the site stays clean and tidy.

how_we_work.title: Deliver
how_we_work.description: We finish the job properly, walk you through the completed work, and make sure you're happy with every detail.

testimonials.quote: Oliver built our kitchen from scratch — it fits perfectly and the quality is brilliant. You can tell it's been made by someone who cares about the detail.
testimonials.name: Recent client

testimonials.quote: Really impressed with the workmanship. Turned up when he said he would, kept the house tidy, and the finished result is exactly what we wanted.
testimonials.name: Recent client

testimonials.quote: We had Oliver do all the joinery on our renovation. Doors, skirting, built-in storage — everything was done to a high standard and on time.
testimonials.name: Recent client
